name: Seoul Blues
overview: A love triangle, hidden pasts, and the return of an old flame... Where will the love of three friends lead? As Min Ji, Dae Yeong, and Jeong Ha meet again after a long time, memories of a past kiss resurface, creating a strange tension. Amidst crossed confessions and love, hearts are wounded, and the sudden appearance of an unexpected character complicates their relationships further. Jealousy, misunderstandings, and betrayal shake their love—will they be able to find true happiness?

trailers.title: [SUB] 석필름 BL K-drama "Seoul Blues" Teaser EP. 0/8
